calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patty Dowling .
Francisco Torres, Esq., for Plaintiff: Caritas Mangement Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Magali Echevarria, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant: Eric Cyrulik.
EXH.1 - Lease/Rental Agreement -------------------ID/EVID.
EXH.2 - 10-Day Notice to Pay or Quit -------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 380 Eddy St., #343, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Damages/Principal $2,231.58
Costs $340.00 for a total of $2,571.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: FRANCISCO TORRES FOR PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ERIC CYRULIK
(DEFENDANT CYRULIK DID ARRIVE LATE (3PM) AND TOLD TO RETURN FOR TRIAL ON 1/22/07)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
